title: Mace Combat Backport
description: Mace Combat Backport for Fabric brings mace combat from newer Minecraft versions to older ones, featuring improved animations, damage tweaks, and knockback effects, all optimized for the Fabric mod loader. Perfect for players on older versions.
body: **Mace Combat Backport for Fabric** reintroduces mace combat from newer Minecraft versions to older ones. It enhances attacks with new animations, damage tweaks, and knockback effects, all optimized for the Fabric mod loader. Ideal for players on older versions.
